author: ILLIA POLIANSKYI, Jaisocx Company
name: @jaisocx/ts-tools
description: The Root catalog of the project, with central config files, package.json devDependencies and node_modules catalog, keeping central devDependencies files hard copies.

scripts.https: . ~/.bashrc; cd "${IN_DOCKER_WORKSPACE_VOLUME}/ts" && pwd; NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider; export NODE_OPTIONS;  node_modules/http-server/bin/http-server -U -d -S -C "${ssl_cert_path}" -K "${private_key_path}" -p "${node_https_publish_port}" "${node_https_publish_folder}"
